etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "grow" + "-n" from Old English "grōwan" (to grow, increase)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Grown increased; having mature development and grown maturity with developed presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Grown increased → mature development → contemporary grown maturity and grown development with mature presence
